title: Sweet sweet HUD!!
description: A delicate overhaul of your HUD – hearts, hunger, XP, and hotbar turned into a seamless, elegant experience
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/774c5d55debea0ff2045cf3e9c8d21ec3550578b.png) *** ### **Features:**
Health: Pastel-pink hearts, like cherry petals
XP Bar: A flowing pastel rainbow
Hunger: Glimmering crystal stars in purple and green colors
Mount Health: A budding amethyst hearts
Hotbar & Menu Buttons: Subtle parchment backgrounds adorned with delicate amethyst accents.
Armor: Iron chestplate with purple glow
｡ ₊°༺❤︎༻°₊ ｡ *** ### **How about full GUI? Try my extensions of this project:** ✦-๑┆ ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfc2191a03e40fe2b271a3da44c69b3277070cc2.png) [**LilacSweet GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lilacsweet-gui) ┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦┆ ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd5d91f991a9421c71d9e0655902b262ec3f73e7.png) [**PinkSweet GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pinksweet-gui) ┆๑-✦‏ *** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack?
